violations.text: Various equipment was stored in a manner that did not allow for equipment to be air dried. Equipment was relocated. Drying rack recommended to allow for more space for drying equipment. Limited space was observed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The floor in the facility has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
